_meta.note: Single source of truth for the blog index (blog.html renders cards + JSON-LD from this). To add a post: create blog/<slug>.html from _post-template.html, then add an entry below. Newest date sorts to the top automatically. Also add a <url> line to /sitemap.xml.
_meta.fields: slug (filename without .html) · title · tag · date (YYYY-MM-DD) · readTime (minutes) · excerpt · image (path from site root) · imageAlt · author (optional, defaults to Matthias Moore)

posts.title: Running Horror at the Table: A Practical Guide
posts.excerpt: Dread is a pace, not a jump scare. A practical guide to running horror in 5e — telegraph danger, protect the unknown, and keep the table safe.
posts.imageAlt: Running Horror at the Table — a practical guide

posts.title: The Crooked Mile Is Here: What It Is and Why I Made It
posts.excerpt: The Edenfall Collection started as a single encounter and grew into something I couldn't stop writing. Here's the origin of The Crooked Mile and what comes next.
posts.imageAlt: The Crooked Mile — Edenfall Collection Vol. 1

posts.title: Building Edenfall: A World Designed for Drop-In Play
posts.excerpt: Most settings ask DMs to learn a world before running it. Edenfall is designed the other way around — you run it first, then the world reveals itself.
posts.imageAlt: Building Edenfall — a world designed for drop-in play
